dripDay0.body:
Welcome to AACsearch Engine! You just took the smartest shortcut to adding world-class search to your product. No servers, no ops team, no headaches.

Here's your quickstart plan — it'll take about 5 minutes:
dripDay0.step1: 1. Create your first search collection and define what you're indexing
dripDay0.step2: 2. Upload your documents — CSV, JSON, or connect a CMS
dripDay0.step3: 3. Run your first search query and see results instantly
dripDay0.step4: 4. Grab an API key and drop search into your app
dripDay0.needHelp: Need a hand? Hit reply — I read every message personally.
dripDay0.subject: Welcome to AACsearch Engine — 5 minutes to your first search

dripDay1.body:
Quick question: have you created your first collection yet?

If yes — awesome. You're already ahead of the curve. If not (or if you hit a snag), here's the fastest way:
dripDay1.tip: Pro tip: start with a small dataset (50-100 records) to test your schema before importing your whole catalog.
dripDay1.subject: Your first collection is 90 seconds away

dripDay3.body:
By now you've probably poked around the dashboard and maybe run a few searches. Next level: connecting your real data.

AACsearch Engine can sync directly with your CMS or e-commerce platform — so your search always stays fresh without manual updates.
dripDay3.supported: Here's what we support out of the box:
dripDay3.connector1: • PrestaShop 8.x — full product sync, categories, prices, stock
dripDay3.connector3: • REST API — connect anything with a POST endpoint
dripDay3.benefit1: ✓ Auto-sync — upload once, it stays current
dripDay3.benefit2: ✓ Real-time updates — changes reflect instantly in search results
dripDay3.orDocs: Need a custom connector? Check our docs:
dripDay3.subject: Connect your CMS to AACsearch Engine

dripDay7.body: One week in. Hope you're seeing results! Here are three features most people discover late — use them now and your search instantly gets better:
dripDay7.tip1: 🔍 Synonyms — "sneakers" and "trainers" should return the same results. Define synonyms once, and your search handles variations automatically.
dripDay7.tip2: ⭐ Curations — want a specific product to always show first for a keyword? Pin it. Perfect for promotions, featured items, or seasonal highlights.
dripDay7.tip3: ⚡ Relevance tuning — not happy with the default ranking? Adjust which fields matter most (title > description > tags) and how fuzzy matching behaves.
dripDay7.personalNote: If there's something you wish search did differently, I genuinely want to hear about it. Reply to this email.
dripDay7.subject: 3 settings that will 10x your search results

dripDay14.body:
Two weeks with AACsearch Engine. By now you've got a sense of what's possible.

Here's a story you might relate to: one of our customers runs a marketplace with 50,000+ products. Before AACsearch, their search was slow, often returned irrelevant results, and their dev team spent hours maintaining it.

After switching: search latency dropped from 800ms to 35ms, zero-result queries fell by 60%, and their support team stopped getting "I can't find anything" tickets.

That could be you.
dripDay14.subject: How 50,000 products found their search in 35ms

dripDay21.body:
Three weeks in. You've seen what AACsearch Engine can do on the free tier. Ready to see what it can really do?

Upgrading unlocks:
dripDay21.benefit1: 🚀 Higher query volumes — handle 10x more searches per month
dripDay21.benefit2: 📊 Analytics dashboard — see what your users are searching for (and not finding)
dripDay21.benefit3: 👥 Team access — invite colleagues to manage search together
dripDay21.benefit4: 🔌 Connectors — auto-sync your CMS data in real time
dripDay21.notNow: Not ready? No pressure. Your free tier stays active — whenever you're ready to scale, we're here.
dripDay21.subject: Scale your search with AACsearch Engine

dripDay30.body:
One month in. We hope AACsearch Engine has been valuable for you.

We're constantly improving and your feedback directly shapes what we build next. We'd love to hear about your experience.
dripDay30.question1: 🤔 What's one thing you wish AACsearch Engine did better?
dripDay30.question2: ⭐ What feature has been most useful for you so far?
dripDay30.replyNote: Or just hit reply — every message goes straight to our product team.
dripDay30.subject: How's AACsearch Engine working for you? (1 question)

notification.openInApp: Open this notification in the app:
notification.subject: New notification

quotaSoftCap.subject: You've used 80% of your search quota
quotaSoftCap.title: Search quota warning
quotaSoftCap.body: Your organization {orgName} ({planName} plan) has used {percentUsed}% of its monthly search quota ({remaining} searches remaining).

quotaHardCap.subject: Search quota reached
quotaHardCap.title: Monthly search limit reached
quotaHardCap.bodyBlocked: Your organization {orgName} ({planName} plan) has reached its monthly search limit. New searches are currently blocked.
quotaHardCap.bodyOverage: Your organization {orgName} ({planName} plan) has reached its monthly search limit. Overage billing is active — searches continue at your plan's overage rate.

subscriptionUpgrade.subject: Your plan has been upgraded to {planName}
subscriptionUpgrade.body: Your plan has been upgraded to **{planName}**! You now have access to all the features included in this plan.
subscriptionUpgrade.cta: Open AACsearch Engine dashboard to start using new features:

invoicePaid.title: Payment Receipt
invoicePaid.body: This is a receipt for your {planName} subscription payment of {amount} on {date}.
invoicePaid.subject: Your AACsearch Engine receipt

paymentFailed.title: Payment Failed
paymentFailed.body: We were unable to process your {planName} subscription payment of {amount} on {date}.
paymentFailed.action: To avoid any interruption to your service, please update your payment method:
paymentFailed.warning: If the payment is not resolved within 7 days, your subscription may be downgraded.
paymentFailed.subject: Action required: AACsearch Engine payment failed

subscriptionCancelled.title: Subscription Cancelled
subscriptionCancelled.body: Your {planName} subscription has been cancelled. You will continue to have access until {endDate}.
subscriptionCancelled.info: If you'd like to continue using AACsearch Engine, you can reactivate your subscription before the end date.
subscriptionCancelled.feedback: We're sorry to see you go. If there's anything we could have done better, please reply to this email.
subscriptionCancelled.subject: AACsearch Engine subscription cancelled
